curation_notes: Patch modifies 3 source files (httpserver/filebased.go, httpserver/handler.go, httpserver/updown.go). The filebased.go change adds a new findEffectiveACL helper function but is not itself a vulnerability location. The vulnerable locations are the four state-changing handler functions (deleteFile, handleMkdir in handler.go and put, upload in updown.go) that lacked authorization checks against the .goshs ACL file. The pre-assigned class auth-bypass (CWE-862) is correct: the fix adds missing authorization enforcement to these mutation routes. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern.
